problem_statement.fact: The existing source-pool proxy and local-context detector evidence can pass rows whose candidate pool has no valid goal after evaluation-only label join.
problem_statement.agent_inference: Goal-validity confirmation is not meaningful until the branch can establish that the candidate pool itself is repairable or valid enough to continue.
problem_statement.paper_constraint: This contract tests source-pool evidence acquisition and routing only. It must not be promoted as terminal ObjectNav utility.

allowed_action_inputs: route-specific action rows with route_action == request_source_pool_repair
semantic rank, semantic score, support score, uncertainty fields, and non-GT source-pool proxy features
candidate ids, candidate roles, grounded_position, visit_position, and reachability fields
local-context detector/SAM2 evidence, projection, depth, mask, box, and association metadata
non-GT backend retrieval candidates or semantic map candidates generated before evaluation label join
Habitat navmesh/standoff feasibility metadata generated without target labels

repair_evidence_objective.required_question: Can action-time evidence repair or reject the candidate pool before any goal-validity confirmation?

route_actions.condition: The current pool lacks candidate-specific support, has no strong own-view evidence, or source/local-context evidence cannot establish candidate-pool validity.
A repaired candidate pool has at least one reachable candidate with independent non-GT support beyond source score-shape and no action-time pool contradiction.
Repair evidence is insufficient, inaccessible, or contradictory.

candidate_pool_accounting: report original candidate ids and repaired candidate ids
report new, removed, duplicated, and unreachable candidate counts
report whether source-top, detector-strong, and local-context candidates remain in the repaired pool
independent_support: report detector/SAM2 or projection evidence if used
report reachability or navmesh feasibility if used
do not treat category visibility alone as candidate-pool validity
failure_accounting: report source-top visibility not goal validity

expected_next_analyzer.name: expanded_retrieval_source_pool_repair_v1
expected_next_analyzer.role: process route-specific source-pool repair rows and decide whether each row needs backend expansion, can proceed to goal-validity confirmation, or should remain deferred
expected_next_analyzer.input_scope: five rows from h001_expanded_retrieval_paper_scale_local_context_route_specific_v1 with route_action == request_source_pool_repair

promotion_rules.contract_only: Passing this contract permits source-pool repair implementation, not a paper utility claim.
promotion_rules.goal_validity_confirmation_unblocked: Goal-validity confirmation can be defined only for rows whose source-pool repair evidence routes to goal-validity confirmation after pool repair.
promotion_rules.paper_claim_blocked: No policy-scale or terminal ObjectNav claim is allowed until repaired-pool evidence and goal-validity confirmation pass on a predeclared source.

next_steps: Implement source-pool repair analyzer from this contract.
Run Docker py_compile or equivalent smoke check.
Run the analyzer on the five frozen request_source_pool_repair rows.
Update failure taxonomy before defining goal-validity confirmation evidence.
